1.gl: to do or make, in the broadest sense and widest application
1.kj: accomplish, advance, appoint, apt, be at, become, bear, bestow, bring forth, bruise, be busy, [idiom] certainly, have the charge of, commit, deal (with), deck, [phrase] displease,

1.gl: properly, perhaps to separate, i.e. distinguish (literally or figuratively); by implication, to be (causatively, make) great, difficult, wonderful
1.kj: accomplish, (arise...too, be too) hard, hidden, things too high, (be, do, do a, shew) marvelous(-ly, -els, things, work), miracles, perform, separate, make singular, (be, great, ma

1.gl: properly, to be open, wide or free, i.e. (by implication) to be safe; causatively, to free or succor
1.kj: [idiom] at all, avenging, defend, deliver(-er), help, preserve, rescue, be safe, bring (having) salvation, save(-iour), get victory.
behold (by mistake for H7789 (שׁוּר)), sing(-er, -ing man, -ing woman).
1.dv: or (the original form) שׁוּר; (1 Samuel 18:6), a primitive root (rather identical with H7788 (שׁוּר) through the idea of strolling minstrelsy);

1.gl: the arm (as stretched out), or (of animals) the foreleg; figuratively, force
1.kj: arm, [phrase] help, mighty, power, shoulder, strength.
1.dv: or (shortened) זְרֹעַ; and (feminine) זְרוֹעָה; or זְרֹעָה; from H2232 (זָרַע);

1.gl: a sacred place or thing; rarely abstract, sanctity
1.kj: consecrated (thing), dedicated (thing), hallowed (thing), holiness, ([idiom] most) holy ([idiom] day, portion, thing), saint, sanctuary.

2.gl: to know (properly, to ascertain by seeing); used in a great variety of senses, figuratively, literally, euphemistically and inferentially (including observation, care, recognition; and causatively, instruction, designati
2.kj: acknowledge, acquaintance(-ted with), advise, answer, appoint, assuredly, be aware, (un-) awares, can(-not), certainly, comprehend, consider, [idiom] could they, cunning, declare,

2.gl: an eye (literally or figuratively); by analogy, a fountain (as the eye of the landscape)

2.gl: to denude (especially in a disgraceful sense); by implication, to exile (captives being usually stripped); figuratively, to reveal

2.gl: a foreign nation; hence, a Gentile; also (figuratively) a troop of animals, or a flight of locusts
2.dv: rarely (shortened) גֹּי; apparently from the same root as H1465 (גֵּוָה) (in the sense of massing);

2.gl: something saved, i.e. (abstractly) deliverance; hence, aid, victory, prosperity
2.kj: deliverance, health, help(-ing), salvation, save, saving (health), welfare.

2.gl: rightness (abstractly), subjectively (rectitude), objectively (justice), morally (virtue) or figuratively (prosperity)

3.gl: to see, literally or figuratively (in numerous applications, direct and implied, transitive, intransitive and causative)

3.gl: cessation, i.e. an end (especially of the earth); often used adverb, no further; also the ankle (in the dual), as being the extremity of the leg or foot
3.kj: ankle, but (only), end, howbeit, less than nothing, nevertheless (where), no, none (beside), not (any, -withstanding), thing of nought, save(-ing), there, uttermost part, want, wit

3.gl: properly, to mark (so as to be recognized), i.e. to remember; by implication, to mention;  to be male
3.kj: [idiom] burn (incense), [idiom] earnestly, be male, (make) mention (of), be mindful, recount, record(-er), remember, make to be remembered, bring (call, come, keep, put) to (in) re
3.dv: a primitive root; also as denominative from H2145 (זָכָר)

3.gl: a house (in the greatest variation of applications, especially family, etc.)

3.gl: gods in the ordinary sense; but specifically used (in the plural thus, especially with the article) of the supreme God; occasionally applied by way of deference to magistrates; and sometimes as a superlative
3.kj: angels, [idiom] exceeding, God (gods) (-dess, -ly), [idiom] (very) great, judges, [idiom] mighty.

3.gl: kindness; by implication (towards God) piety; rarely (by opposition) reproof, or (subject.) beauty
3.kj: favour, good deed(-liness, -ness), kindly, (loving-) kindness, merciful (kindness), mercy, pity, reproach, wicked thing.

4.gl: play upon it; to make music, accompanied by the voice; hence to celebrate in song and music
4.kj: give praise, sing forth praises, psalms.
4.dv: a primitive root (perhaps identical with H2168 (זָמַר) through the idea of striking with the fingers); properly, to touch the strings or parts of a mu

4.gl: to mar (especially by breaking); figuratively, to split the ears (with sound), i.e. shout (for alarm or joy)
4.kj: blow an alarm, cry (alarm, aloud, out), destroy, make a joyful noise, smart, shout (for joy), sound an alarm, triumph.

4.gl: properly, to creak (or emit a stridulous sound), i.e. to shout (usually for joy)
4.kj: aloud for joy, cry out, be joyful (greatly, make to) rejoice, (cause to) shout (for joy), (cause to) sing (aloud, for joy, out), triumph.

4.gl: the earth (at large, or partitively a land)
4.kj: [idiom] common, country, earth, field, ground, land, [idiom] natins, way, [phrase] wilderness, world.
4.dv: from an unused root probably meaning to be firm;

4.gl: Jehovah, Jewish national name of God
4.kj: Jehovah, the Lord. Compare H3050 (יָהּ), H3069 (יְהֹוִה).
break (forth, forth into joy), make a loud noise.

5.kj: Jehovah, the Lord. Compare H3050 (יָהּ), H3069 (יְהֹוִה).

5.gl: a musical piece or song to be accompanied by an instrument

5.dv: from a unused root meaning to twang;

6.gl: the face (as the part that turns); used in a great variety of applications (literally and figuratively); also (with prepositional prefix) as a preposition (before, etc.)
6.kj: [phrase] accept, a-(be-) fore(-time), against, anger, [idiom] as (long as), at, [phrase] battle, [phrase] because (of), [phrase] beseech, countenance, edge, [phrase] employ, endure
6.dv: plural (but always as singular) of an unused noun פָּנֶה; from H6437 (פָּנָה));

6.kj: [phrase] aloud, bleating, crackling, cry ([phrase] out), fame, lightness, lowing, noise, [phrase] hold peace, (pro-) claim, proclamation, [phrase] sing, sound, [phrase] spark, thun
6.dv: or קֹל; from an unused root meaning to call aloud;

6.gl: to mar (especially by breaking); figuratively, to split the ears (with sound), i.e. shout (for alarm or joy)
6.kj: blow an alarm, cry (alarm, aloud, out), destroy, make a joyful noise, smart, shout (for joy), sound an alarm, triumph.

6.gl: Jehovah, Jewish national name of God
6.kj: Jehovah, the Lord. Compare H3050 (יָהּ), H3069 (יְהֹוִה).

6.gl: a cornet (as giving a clear sound) or curved horn

6.gl: a trumpet (from its sundered or quavering note)

7.gl: properly, to sit down (specifically as judge. in ambush, in quiet); by implication, to dwell, to remain; causatively, to settle, to marry
7.kj: (make to) abide(-ing), continue, (cause to, make to) dwell(-ing), ease self, endure, establish, [idiom] fail, habitation, haunt, (make to) inhabit(-ant), make to keep (house), lurk

7.gl: a sea (as breaking in noisy surf) or large body of water; specifically (with the article), the Mediterranean Sea; sometimes a large river, or an artifical basin; locally, the west, or (rarely) the south
7.dv: from an unused root meaning to roar;

7.kj: [idiom] all along, [idiom] all that is (there-) in, fill, ([idiom] that whereof...was) full, fulness, (hand-) full, multitude.
7.dv: rarely מְלוֹא; or מְלוֹ; (Ezekiel [41:8), from H4390 (מָלֵא);

7.gl: the earth (as moist and therefore inhabited); by extension, the globe; by implication, its inhabitants; specifically, a particular land, as Babylonia, Palestine
to tumble, i.e. be violently agitated; specifically, to crash (of thunder); figuratively, to irritate (with anger)
7.kj: make to fret, roar, thunder, trouble.

8.gl: the hollow hand or palm (so of the paw of an animal, of the sole, and even of the bowl of a dish or sling, the handle of a bolt, the leaves of a palm-tree); figuratively, power
8.kj: branch, [phrase] foot, hand((-ful), -dle, (-led)), hollow, middle, palm, paw, power, sole, spoon.

8.gl: properly, to creak (or emit a stridulous sound), i.e. to shout (usually for joy)
8.kj: aloud for joy, cry out, be joyful (greatly, make to) rejoice, (cause to) shout (for joy), (cause to) sing (aloud, for joy, out), triumph.

8.gl: a mountain or range of hills (sometimes used figuratively)

8.kj: alike, at all (once), both, likewise, only, (al-) together, withal.

8.gl: a stream (including the sea; expectation the Nile, Euphrates, etc.); figuratively, prosperity

9.gl: the face (as the part that turns); used in a great variety of applications (literally and figuratively); also (with prepositional prefix) as a preposition (before, etc.)
9.kj: [phrase] accept, a-(be-) fore(-time), against, anger, [idiom] as (long as), at, [phrase] battle, [phrase] because (of), [phrase] beseech, countenance, edge, [phrase] employ, endure

9.gl: to go or come (in a wide variety of applications)

9.gl: to judge, i.e. pronounce sentence (for or against); by implication, to vindicate or punish; by extenssion, to govern; passively, to litigate (literally or figuratively)
9.kj: [phrase] avenge, [idiom] that condemn, contend, defend, execute (judgment), (be a) judge(-ment), [idiom] needs, plead, reason, rule.

9.gl: evenness, i.e. (figuratively) prosperity or concord; also straightness, i.e. (figuratively) rectitude (only in plural with singular sense; often adverbially)
9.kj: agreement, aright, that are equal, equity, (things that are) right(-eously, things), sweetly, upright(-ly, -ness).

9.gl: the right (natural, moral or legal); also (abstractly) equity or (figuratively) prosperity
9.kj: [idiom] even, ([idiom] that which is altogether) just(-ice), (un-)right(-eous) (cause, -ly, -ness).

9.gl: the earth (as moist and therefore inhabited); by extension, the globe; by implication, its inhabitants; specifically, a particular land, as Babylonia, Palestine
